/DAWT/CAL:PREHEARING CONFERENCE/CONT/DAWF/CTORD:THE DEFENDANT TO ATTEND 2NA  MEETINGS PER WEEK UNTIL 09-22-21 AND ORDERS THE ATTORNEY TO BRING PROOF THEREOF AT THE NEXT HEARING/EMTERM/CTORD:THAT THE SCRAM DEVICE BE REMOVED FROM THE DEFENDANT/

/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/PD/FAWC/DEFTARR1/X:THE DEFENSE RESERVES THE RIGHT TO DEMURRER,/NTW/LDPX: 07-29-21 (30), 08-16-21 (60)/987,2/ACM/X:AS A CONDITION OF RELEASE, THE DEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACED ON PRE-TRIAL MONITORING BY THE SHERIFF'S OFFICE,/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH A SCRAMDEVICE, AND IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH ALLTERMS OF RELEASE AS SET FORTH ON THE RECORD AND BY THE SFSO/CTORD: SFSO COMMUNITY PROGRAMS WILL PLACE AN ELECTRONIC MONITORING DEVICE ON THE DEFENDANT PRIOR TO RELEASE FROM CUSTODY AND WILL PROVIDE ALL INSTRUCTIONS AT THAT TIME,/CTORD: DEFENDANT MUST NOT CONSUME ANY ALCOHOL OR MARIJUANA/X:SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE,/SAORD/SA2: GREGORY JOHNSON, 49 YEAR OLD MALE/SA3: 1 AL SCOMA WAY, SAN FRANCISCO, CA/SAORD1/SAORD2/SAORD3/CONTD: PREHEARING CONFERENCE/DAWF/
/CAL:PREHEARING CONFERENCE/CONT/DAWF/STWPX/X:THE DEFENDANT HAS RETAINED JONAH CHEW AS DEFENSE COUNSEL; PUBLIC DEFENDER IS RELIEVED/
